top_signals.title: Kylian Mbappe says France can get its ‘hands dirty’ too after scrappy win over Paraguay
top_signals.summary: "They thought we'd turn up in tuxedos, that we'd just come to pull off some spectacular moves," Mbappe said after the match.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
